name: First Community Credit Union - Alief
description_short: First Community Credit Union's Alief branch offers traditional credit union banking services including deposits, withdrawals, and video teller services at a temporary location during renovations.
description_long: First Community Credit Union (FCCU) is a credit union operating multiple branches across the Houston area, including the Alief location. The Alief branch serves the local community with standard retail banking services and is currently operating from a temporary lobby at 12121 Westheimer Road, Suite 201, as the main facility undergoes renovations beginning October 5, 2024. As a credit union, FCCU operates on a membership-based model typical of the credit union system, distinguishing it from traditional banks through its cooperative structure. The Alief branch provides essential banking convenience through both lobby and extended drive-thru hours, making services accessible for various schedules. While the website confirms basic transaction capabilities, it does not detail loan products, savings accounts, checking account features, interest rates, or membership requirements—information typically important for consumers evaluating a financial institution. The temporary location and ongoing renovations may present considerations for members accustomed to the original Alief branch layout and services. FCCU appears to be part of a larger credit union network with multiple branch locations (Spring Branch, Cinco Ranch, Aliana), suggesting reasonable geographic accessibility for members across greater Houston.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended drive-thru hours (7:30 am - 7:00 pm weekdays) provide banking access outside standard business hours
Saturday lobby hours (9:00 am - 3:00 pm) offer weekend banking convenience
Personal video teller service available for remote assistance beyond ATM transactions
Multiple service channels including cash deposits, withdrawals, and cashier's checks
Mobile app available (free FCCU app on Google Play) for digital banking
Temporary lobby location maintained during main branch renovations to minimize service disruption
Additional branch locations (Spring Branch, Cinco Ranch, Aliana) provide network access across Houston area
cons: Currently operating from temporary location with renovations ongoing—original branch facilities unavailable
Website provides minimal information about loan products, account types, rates, or membership eligibility
No details provided about fees, minimum balances, or other important account conditions
Limited service information suggests this is a basic location page rather than comprehensive product overview
Sunday banking unavailable at this location
best_for: Houston-area residents seeking traditional credit union banking with convenient drive-thru access
Members who need Saturday banking hours and extended weekday drive-thru availability
Customers preferring video teller services for remote assistance beyond standard ATM functions
diagnosis: First Community Credit Union's Alief branch is best for Houston residents seeking basic credit union banking services with convenient extended hours and drive-thru access. The primary caveat is that the website provides insufficient detail about account types, loan products, fees, rates, and membership requirements—consumers should contact the branch directly or visit the full FCCU website to evaluate whether their financial needs align with the credit union's offerings.
services: Wait list enrollment for future services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3200 S Dairy Ashford Rd, Houston, TX 77082
